text.message: haven't played ranked 4p since the vietnam war
I saw you on the wanderer's YT... so toxic...

Griffin Burstyn won the 2023 Catan US National Championship, earning him the title of the 2023 US National Champion. He defeated three other players in the final to secure the victory. This win led to
representing the U.S. at the 2023 Catan World Championship in Germany.
im so lost on this board
but coord 5 for green is no bueno
hopefully it gets locked but idk
btw you always block the 10 wheat there, and I trade u wheat
was "u got it king" a yes to the nb?
I thought you were telling me to pull for it
apologies, would have taken from you
robbing the 8410 912 guy is a crazy take
can take an ore or brick
dont give the wood wheat sheep guy brick or ore for free
good thing I have wheat to trade
u dont want insurance from me?
but can you hold a bunch of cards?
can u give a brick for the sheeps
then I can settle and really trade wheat
can u take a free wood red?
these are the most convoluted deals I've ever seen online
I got wheat to trade fellas
I would like to build a city one day
I dream of the day I can build a road xD
I would assume we can make fair deals, and rob the leader
finally the gods relieve me of my hell
hes just porting it tho, its a free card
in the lead and likely to win are much different things
fair we're all a long ways
can do brick or wheat nb
they both have one, I have none
wanna give a free ore red
I have all wood and sheep
thats not how you win catan games
you can easily build 2 cities get brick port and take road
yeah but giving free ore doesnt get me there
I mean I'm trying to trade u wheat
but I guess we're soloing my 8
red has like 6 ore in hand
you said youd trade wheat lol
so we're on the same points, and he has a 3:1 port
he's also going to win the game probably
I stole 3 wheat from you lol
black you have taken soooo many wheat/sheep from me this game
yeah im not takin road or army
with my yop vp and 1 card lol
red can u trade a brick?
ya thats dangerous with the city and brick port
i just wanna drop a road
I have no more settle spots :(
how is putting you on 8 fair
actually does make sense to make me play the 3rd knight despite me not being the threat
it kinda just goes instantly to his 5/8 tho
i think i need to get rid of this
yeah bit silly after 9 just rolled
think red may have winning rolls here but we take the risk
